title: Core source: types, store, CLI, all commands, tests
description: Build the entire src/ directory per spec.md. Includes: types.ts, store.ts (JSONL read/write/lock/atomic), id.ts, config.ts, yaml.ts (minimal parser), output.ts, index.ts (CLI entry + router). All commands: init, create, show, list, ready, update, close, dep, sync, blocked, stats, tpl, migrate. All tests: store.test.ts, id.test.ts, yaml.test.ts, init.test.ts, create.test.ts, dep.test.ts, tpl.test.ts. Also: package.json, tsconfig.json, biome.json, root .gitignore. See spec.md for full details.
closeReason: Complete Seeds CLI implementation merged to master. 33 files, ~2400 LOC. Core modules (types, store with JSONL locking/atomic writes/dedup, id, config, yaml, output), CLI entry with command router, all 13 commands (init, create, show, list, ready, update, close, dep, sync, blocked, stats, tpl, migrate-from-beads), 7 test files (41 tests). All quality gates pass.

title: Project infrastructure: CI, docs, scripts, CLAUDE.md
description: Build project infrastructure per spec.md. Includes: .github/workflows/ci.yml, .github/workflows/auto-tag.yml, CLAUDE.md, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, scripts/version-bump.ts, .claude/commands/release.md. See spec.md for full details on each file.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-infra/Seeds-da3c - all 7 infrastructure files created

title: Fix typecheck: tsconfig rootDir and bun install
description: Two typecheck issues: (1) bun-types not found - run bun install to populate node_modules. (2) scripts/version-bump.ts is outside rootDir ./src but included in tsconfig. Fix: either remove rootDir from tsconfig, or exclude scripts from include and add a separate scripts tsconfig, or change rootDir to '.'. Keep it minimal.
